rationale: The candidate provides a high-quality translation that maintains the technical nuances of JavaScript Promises while adopting a natural Hebrew tone. It correctly handles MDX asset paths (adding ../) and preserves all heading levels. It uses standard Hebrew technical terminology (e.g., 'קולבק', 'בדיקות יחידה') and maintains the author's direct, slightly informal style. The other candidate (gpt-oss) used slightly more archaic or less standard phrasing in some places (e.g., 'המדומיינת' for alleged, 'לתלות אליו' which is a literal but awkward translation of 'hang on to').
